programme.title: The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Win the football championship with Gecko! Fix broken vehicles and teach Weasel that cheaters never win.

programme.title: Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: Learn with Twinkle! She counts colorful balloons, learns shapes with sandcastles & plants beautiful flowers!

programme.title: A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: It's a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! She learns about cloud shapes & makes the moon sneeze stardust!

programme.title: JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: JJ shares his favorite stories! Hear the tales of "The Three Little Pigs" & "The Tortoise and the Hare"!

programme.title: Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: It's a pirate adventure! JJ plays pirates on the high seas, builds a sandcastle & hunts for hidden treasure!

programme.title: Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an underwater learning adventure! The Sharksons sing the ABCs, learn colors & brush their shark teeth!

programme.title: A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's an underwater sing-along! Sing about five little sharks jumping on the bed & an underwater spider!

programme.title: The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: It's a teamwork & rescue special! Kii & Yii save Princess Cat from a well & from her out-of-control plane!

programme.title: Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Let's sing classic songs with KiiYii! They sing "Bingo" on the farm & "Two Little Dicky Birds"!

programme.title: A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming night with Twinkle! She helps the kids get ready for bed & takes Bao Bao on a balloon ride!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: It's time for sweet dreams! Mia plays "Ten in a Bed," takes a bubble bath & goes on a rocket ride to the moon!

programme.title: Calming Star Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies

programme.title: JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: JJ has yummy food & clean-up fun! He makes pasta with Grandma, eats healthy fruit & gives Bingo a bath!

programme.title: Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Challenge your parents to a game of sports! Play soccer, basketball, and baseball with JJ and all his friends.

programme.title: A Sick Trick, A Spider, A Bump & A Fly!
programme.desc: The Minibods face their fears! Jeff fakes being sick & Fuse is scared of a spider & some spooky noises!

programme.title: Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: It's a creative day for the Minibods! Newt learns to slow down her drawing & Lulu tries to make a music video!

programme.title: A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: It's a big day of imagination! Mia & Max build a dollhouse, see shadow puppets & play with monster bottles!

programme.title: A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a day of food, play & learning! The kids have a teddy bear picnic & learn to say hello with a wave!

programme.title: Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Play in a big soccer match with Buster the Bus and learn that teamwork is more important than winning!

programme.title: Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning & growing! He overcomes his fear of the carwash & learns the importance of dental health!

programme.title: What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? He moves to a new house, plays with a cardboard box & sings the ABCs in his soup!

programme.title: What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? He learns about the days of the week, Valentine's Day & the Spanish alphabet!

programme.title: Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn important lessons! Pogo learns to compromise at a party & Newt learns not to give up!

programme.title: My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn big lessons! Bubbles becomes Lulu's hero & Fuse is encouraged to eat his healthy greens!

programme.title: Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Join a perfect playtime party with Mia and friends! Play with a magic ball, jump in a ball pit, and dance!

programme.title: A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's a playtime sing-along! Mia & Max play a fishing game, have a tea party & pretend to be puppies!

programme.title: Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Buster learns to do the right thing! He learns that telling the truth is best & helps save a runaway train!

programme.title: Using Your Brains to Save the Day!
programme.desc: Buster uses his brains to save the day! He escapes from a floating bubble & becomes a hero ambulance bus!

programme.title: Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Train for the big game with Cody! Race on motor trikes, play on the playground, and hike through autumn leaves.

programme.title: Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Race to the finish line with Cody and friends! Compete in a soccer match and a fast-paced sprint to the end.

programme.title: Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Blippi explores wonders of the world! He climbs Mt. Everest, dives underwater & blasts off to the moon!

programme.title: Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Blippi makes fun nature discoveries! He learns why islands don't float & how ants walk in a straight line!

programme.title: How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi wonders how things work! He learns how honey is made, how cranes build & what first cars were like!

programme.title: Baby John's Guide to Being Safe!
programme.desc: Baby John learns to be safe! He learns to wear a seatbelt, what to do for a boo boo & how to play safely!

programme.title: Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Baby John's on a big outdoor adventure! He goes camping with his family & builds a giant sand turtle!

programme.title: Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: It's a creative farm adventure! Ella brings school to the barn, makes delicious jam & does some stargazing!

programme.title: Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: There are big surprises on the farm! Ella & Bee find a mysterious tortoise egg & meet new tiger twin friends!

programme.title: Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Kick the winning goal in a big soccer match, then learn the importance of teamwork and trying your best.

programme.title: How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: How does JJ like to play? He pretends to be a doctor, plays "Simon Says" & camps with his siblings!

programme.title: When Magical Pet Powers Run Wild!
programme.desc: Magical Pet powers run wild! A Bubble Monster traps everyone & a sick Shrubcub makes vines grow!

programme.title: A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle welcome new Magic Pets! They meet a pet that grows jungles & one that makes juice pops!

programme.title: The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's Arpo vs. Squirrel! Arpo battles an army of squirrels & stops the pesky rodent from stealing a pie!

programme.title: When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Arpo's imagination runs wild! He thinks he's a pirate, builds a rollercoaster & battles a jelly monster!

programme.title: When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Buster is a hero for his friends! He saves Scout from a scary storm & gets pulled out of the mud by a tractor!

programme.title: Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Play in a big soccer match with Buster the Bus and learn that teamwork is more important than winning!

programme.title: The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: The whole crew is to the rescue! They save a stranded Blue, help Kat in an out-of-control car & make a beach!

programme.title: Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko has some genius outdoor fixes! He builds a water wheel & uses a bouncy castle to rescue a flying Weasel!

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: 3AM - The Driver
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: 3AM - The Driver
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female police officer relocates to a quiet small town and is drawn into a chilling case involving a girl seemingly possessed by an evil spirit. As her investigation deepens, unsettling truths emerge. She soon realises this is not just an exorcism, but a psychological battle that uncovers the town’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. When the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at an abandoned building — only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female police officer relocates to a quiet small town and is drawn into a chilling case involving a girl seemingly possessed by an evil spirit. As her investigation deepens, unsettling truths emerge. She soon realises this is not just an exorcism, but a psychological battle that uncovers the town’s dark secrets.

Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When Pam Shelly, 31, is found in her Cuero, Texas, bathroom with a fatal gunshot wound to the head, her death is initially ruled a suicide.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: One of the summer season's seminal events, the Hot Summer Nights classic car show, rolls into town for a day of fun, but things turn really hot that night when there is an outbreak of bar fights.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: On the eve of Lunar New Year, a mass shooting shatters a California dance studio, leaving investigators to unravel how jealousy and resentment escalated into one of the deadliest attacks.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Arthur Shawcross tells a lot of stories about his life before he began to kill. He might have been known for killing women along Rochester's Genesee River, but his first murder was years earlier.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Holiday spirit all but disappears from Marietta, Georgia, when one of its most festive residents is found murdered in his own home.

programme.title: KL Enforcers (S1)
programme.desc: The Royal Malaysian Police uses cutting edge forensic technology to investigate an armed robbery in a jewellery shop and the Marine Police patrols the waters of South Malaysia known for illegal activities.

programme.title: KL Enforcers (S1)
programme.desc: The Royal Malaysia Police forensics team faces their biggest task to date when MH17 is shot down in war-torn eastern Ukraine. How can they bring the victims home to their loved ones amidst the fighting?

programme.title: Women on Death Row
programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: One wrong move could get anyone booked in; like a son who landed himself in jail after his dad rear-ended a car, or a gearhead who gets spotted by a helicopter after allegedly doing a burnout.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A man tells police he was pushed to the brink before murdering his wife; an A-list actor is questioned in a deadly on-set death; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A teen gives the chilling reason for why she killed her 9-year-old neighbour; a man turns himself in after committing a deadly mistake; an investigator uses her skills to get a killer to open up; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When the body of a Jane Doe is found dumped on a roadside, it's up to Dr. Satish Chundru to identify her and find out how she died, spawning an investigation retracing the victim's last night.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Lia's hoarding went into overdrive when her three sons moved out, and Lia's husband, Ken, worked full time. After a severe blood infection, Lia realizes the extreme danger her home presents to her.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: The Wagners stand accused of murdering eight members of the Rhoden family over a bitter child custody dispute.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The peaceful town of Mountain City, TN, is rocked when a beloved young couple is found brutally murdered in their home.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Lia's hoarding went into overdrive when her three sons moved out, and Lia's husband, Ken, worked full time. After a severe blood infection, Lia realizes the extreme danger her home presents to her.

programme.desc: The Wagners stand accused of murdering eight members of the Rhoden family over a bitter child custody dispute.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The peaceful town of Mountain City, TN, is rocked when a beloved young couple is found brutally murdered in their home.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: One wrong move could get anyone booked in; like a son who landed himself in jail after his dad rear-ended a car, or a gearhead who gets spotted by a helicopter after allegedly doing a burnout.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A man tells police he was pushed to the brink before murdering his wife; an A-list actor is questioned in a deadly on-set death; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A teen gives the chilling reason for why she killed her 9-year-old neighbour; a man turns himself in after committing a deadly mistake; an investigator uses her skills to get a killer to open up; and more.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou

programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Interieurs
programme.desc: While walking the Camino de Santiago, Christele and Hubert never imagined their lives would radically change during a stop in Lectoure, in the Gers. They fell in love with an old building, abandoned for nearly thirty years, and restored it.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures
programme.desc: In France, Nathalie Lasselin welcomes cave diving enthusiasts. Together they explore an abandoned limestone quarry in Saint-Meme-les-Carrieres, before discovering the famous Le Ressel cave. Renowned for its incredible network of underground karst passages, the Lot is one of the world's leading areas for cave diving.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Chef Pays
programme.desc: Chef Leila Albert is preparing a Tahitian tea with banana and mango.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Interieurs
programme.desc: While walking the Camino de Santiago, Christele and Hubert never imagined their lives would radically change during a stop in Lectoure, in the Gers. They fell in love with an old building, abandoned for nearly thirty years, and restored it.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: On board merchant navy ships, women are few, especially in officer positions. At Genavir, the maritime company of Ifremer, Enora is an exception: she is the first female captain.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'Objets
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'Imagier anime De Koumi
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre SA Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Objectif Monde
programme.desc: 'Objectif Monde'' proposes special reports and investigations into societal or geopolitical issues, taking the time to analyse the situations thanks to different specialist opinions. This TV5MONDE programme is produced with French-speaking partners (RTBF, RTS, Radio-Canada, France Televisions) and the support of the public French-speaking media.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: Following a colleague's sexual assault, Louise, a semi-skilled worker with a strong character, decides it's time to end the permanent ambiance of sexism and bullying that's reigned in their printing works for years. A veritable revolution that Louise and her female colleagues are determined to see through to the end.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: Les Joueuses #Paslapourdanser
programme.desc: The Olympique Lyonnais players are among the best having gone from victory to victory and won the French championship thirteen times. A glimpse into their daily lives, asking us to change the way we look at the place of women in sport, where the values of respect and openness are essential to move towards equality.

programme.title: Un Bon Garcon
programme.desc: Max, a talented 16-year-old swimmer, is getting ready to enter the sports studies programme. Between training sessions and outings with his friends, he leads the life of an average teenager. But when the police turn up one day to question his coach, who has been accused of sexual abuse, his regulated life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Piscine Pro
programme.desc: With a degree in history and civilisation, Charles-Olivier is struggling to find a job in his field. He eventually takes a job as a clerk in a swimming pool shop. With his spirits low, he's getting by as best he can.

programme.title: Natures Humaines
programme.desc: To avoid arguments, Real changes the duos for the next activity: finding the way to the chalet with a compass. Bonds are formed and the students reveal more about themselves.

programme.title: Natures Humaines
programme.desc: After three days, Real feels that the couples are ready for a more important experience: sleeping in the forest. A pivotal night for the three duos who feel the lack of privacy in their shelter weighs on them.

programme.title: Natures Humaines
programme.desc: Finding the students sullen after their night of winter camping, Real suggests a handicraft activity to them: making a catapult.

programme.title: Natures Humaines
programme.desc: On the programme for the final day: the participants have to make a totem that represents them. When they reveal the results of their work, they show considerable vulnerability.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express
